Careers

Join the Milier Harris team.

Explore →
Selective · Strictly merit-based

Careers.

A highly disciplined firm built on intellectual rigour.

01 Working environment

Analytical precision, an exacting approach

Milier Harris operates a highly disciplined firm built on intellectual rigour. Our Geneva headquarters serves as a hub for international asset coordination, requiring staff to navigate complex regulatory frameworks daily.

The Milier Harris working environment demands analytical precision and an exacting approach to problem-solving. We recruit individuals who prioritise factual accuracy over conventional assumptions.

02 Expectations

Demonstrated technical mastery, absolute discretion

Joining our team requires a demonstrated history of technical mastery within your respective discipline. We mandate absolute operational discretion.

Our professionals must synthesise extensive data sets into actionable, straightforward counsel.

We expect all team members to operate with high autonomy and rely entirely on structural logic.

03 Current opportunities

Selective expansion to meet specific mandates

We selectively expand our team to meet specific client mandates. Open positions are strictly merit-based.

Milier Harris is an independent Geneva-based multi-family office providing integrated private wealth advisory and operational oversight to international principals and families. We operate across investment strategy, corporate structuring, real estate, governance, and cross-border wealth coordination with a focus on precision, discretion, and long-term capital preservation.

We are seeking an Investment Analyst to support the firm's investment and advisory activities across public and private markets.

The role

The successful candidate will assist with investment research, portfolio analysis, market monitoring, and strategic reporting for ultra-high-net-worth clients and affiliated structures. The role requires strong analytical capability, commercial judgement, and a high level of discretion.

You will work closely with senior advisors on a broad range of mandates, including portfolio construction, manager evaluation, asset allocation analysis, private investment opportunities, and risk assessment.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct investment research across public and private markets
  • Prepare market commentary and portfolio reviews
  • Analyse market optimisation, asset allocation, liquidity exposure, and portfolio risk metrics
  • Support due diligence on funds, managers, and direct investment opportunities
  • Monitor macroeconomic developments and relevant market activity
  • Assist with financial modelling and performance reporting
  • Coordinate with external banks, managers, legal counsel, and specialist advisors when required
  • Maintain high standards of confidentiality and operational accuracy

Location

Geneva, Switzerland

Type

Full-time

Requirements

  • Degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or a related discipline
  • 2–5 years of relevant experience within investment management, private banking, asset management, or a family office environment
  • Strong financial analysis and Excel modelling skills
  • Excellent written and verbal communication abilities
  • High attention to detail and organisational discipline
  • Ability to operate effectively within a discreet, fast-moving environment
  • CFA progression or qualification is advantageous

What we offer

  • Exposure to complex international wealth structures and investment mandates
  • Direct collaboration with senior decision-makers and principals
  • A highly analytical and intellectually rigorous working environment
  • Long-term professional development within an independent family office platform
  • Competitive compensation aligned with experience and capability
Apply for this role
04 Application

Submit your cv and a brief cover letter

To apply, please submit your CV and a brief cover letter to Milier Harris at office@milierharris.com or fill in the application form below.

Reviewed in confidence by our team.
Application received. Thank you — we will be in touch if your profile aligns with the role.

An independent multi-family office. We work with a small number of principals and families, by appointment.
